name: Eugenia Gislain
description: Flower Seller in the village. Very sympathetic girl.
dialogues: I'm so glad you're still kicking it!

relatedQuests.trigger: Hey, could I ask you a favour? Its quite simple really.
relatedQuests.denialOfTrigger: Oh... Alright, I know you're a busy one! See ya...
dialogues: Oh thank you for hearing me out!
So there's this dungeon outside of the village...
For some reason, no one pays it any mind...
But I was collecting herbs the other day, and saw something move...
And, I mean, It didn't look either human or animalistic... Like a camouflaged white.
I'll make it worth your while if you can just check it out.
